name: heartbeat-monitor
_phase_7_note: Phase 7 dead-man-switch — pure n8n (no Railway worker dependency, so the monitor survives even if the worker dies). Every 2h it reads the last 50 runs from Supabase, finds the most-recent perception_tick + weekly_brief, and Telegram-alerts ONLY when something is silent: perception_tick older than 8h (cron is 6h, so one skipped tick + buffer), or weekly_brief older than 8 days. Always appends a heartbeat_check runs row (exit_status ok|alert) so the monitor itself is observable. Mirrors the daily_spend_report.json node pattern (scheduleTrigger 1.1 + httpRequest 4.2 + code 2).
